title: Electrical & Instrumentation Project Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced Electrical & Instrumentation (E&I) Project Manager to lead and manage electrical and instrumentation projects from initiation to completion. The successful candidate will be responsible for project planning, coordination, execution, and delivery, ensuring all works are completed safely, on time, within budget, and in compliance with Singapore standards and regulations.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage end-to-end E&I projects including design coordination, procurement, installation, testing, and commissioning
  • Plan project schedules, manpower allocation, materials, and cost control
  • Coordinate with clients, consultants, main contractors, subcontractors, and suppliers
  • Ensure compliance with local codes, standards, and regulatory requirements (e.g. EMA, MOM, SS, IEC)
  • Oversee site activities, progress tracking, and quality assurance
  • Manage variation orders, claims, and project documentation
  • Conduct site meetings, progress reporting, and risk assessments
  • Ensure strict adherence to workplace safety and health (WSH) requirements
  • Resolve technical and site issues efficiently to minimize delays

Requirements

  • Minimum 10 years of relevant working experience in Singapore in electrical and instrumentation projects
  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical Engineering, Instrumentation Engineering, or related field
  • Strong experience managing E&I works in industrial, commercial, or infrastructure projects
  • Familiar with Singapore regulations, codes of practice, and authority submissions
  • Proven leadership and project management skills
  • Ability to work independently and handle multiple projects simultaneously
  • Good communication and coordination skills
  • Proficient in project documentation and reporting
  • Preferred Qualifications (Advantage)
  • Professional Engineer (PE) or Licensed Electrician (LEW) certification
  • Experience with control systems, instrumentation, and automation projects
  • Strong knowledge of testing & commissioning procedures

postedCompany.description:
ECO One Solutions Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based integrated Turnkey PCM (Process, Construction, and Maintenance) service provider established in 2023.

We specialize in providing comprehensive engineering, procurement, fabrication, and maintenance solutions tailored for the oil & gas, petrochemical, energy, chemicals, and power generation industries.

Our business is built on the ACE philosophy : Attitude, Carefulness, and Efficiency. We combine multi-layer technical competencies with an unyielding dedication to safety and quality to deliver competitive, high-standard solutions for our clients.
postedCompany.name: ECO ONE SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
